title: Child Safety Policy
intro: At Tariq Islam, owned and operated by Busaki Media, we are committed to protecting all users, including minors, and ensuring a safe, respectful, and secure online environment. Although our platform is intended for adults, we maintain strict child safety standards and prohibit any content or behavior that endangers minors.

bullets.1: Tariq Islam is developed for adults (18+).
bullets.2: We do not target children, and we do not design features specifically for children.

bullets.1: Our app content, communication features, and services are not aimed at children.
bullets.2: We do not display child-directed images, animations, or themes.

bullets.1: All users must follow our Community Guidelines.
bullets.2: Hate speech, harassment, explicit content, scams, bullying, threats, grooming, exploitation, and content that endangers minors are prohibited.
bullets.3: Violations may result in account suspension, permanent removal, or reporting to appropriate authorities.

4.title: 4. Reporting & Moderation Tools

items.5: Violations of Islamic conduct and community rules

4.note: Our moderation team reviews reports and takes action when needed.

bullets.1: Children under 13 are not allowed to create an account.
bullets.2: We encourage parents and guardians to monitor children’s device usage.

6.title: 6. Data Protection
6.p1: We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.
6.p2: If we discover that a minor has created an account in violation of our policies, we may remove the account.

bullets.3: Avoid sharing sensitive, exploitative, illegal, or harmful content

8.title: 8. Child Sexual Abuse and Exploitation (CSAE) Policy
8.lead: Tariq Islam, owned and operated by Busaki Media, has zero tolerance for Child Sexual Abuse and Exploitation (CSAE), Child Sexual Abuse Material (CSAM), grooming, exploitation, or any content that endangers minors.
8.emailLabel: Users are strictly prohibited from posting, sharing, transmitting, or promoting any form of child sexual abuse material or exploitative behavior through Tariq Islam, including private messages, community posts, audio calls, video calls, and group chats.
8.emailValue: Any user found violating this policy will be permanently banned, and offending content may be removed immediately. Tariq Islam reserves the right to report suspected illegal activity to law enforcement and child protection organizations.
